source.name: FRED — U.S. Treasury constant maturity and TIPS yields (design reference)
source.note: EXAMPLE / DESIGN ONLY — illustrative rate levels for schema and validator tests; not operator-verified FRED extracts. Candidate series IDs in source.series must be verified at each FRED series page before v1.7d production. Example values are not production data.

series.label: Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 30-Year Constant Maturity
Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Inflation-Indexed Securities at 30-Year Maturity
Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 2-Year Constant Maturity
Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 5-Year Constant Maturity
Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 10-Year Constant Maturity

caveats: Not investment advice and not a recommendation to buy or sell Treasury securities or bond funds.
Not a duration allocation signal — yield levels alone do not prove income neglect or investor behavior.
Nominal and real yields can move for different macro reasons; duration risk remains.
Display-only future default for Treasury Plumbing; not included in the GhostFlow Research Composite.
mappingStatus not_final; no scored pressure mapping in v1.7c.
Illustrative FRED-aligned example values only — operator must verify series IDs and extract official values in v1.7d.
